changeSet.author: Thang
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO authors (full_name, pen_name, country, status, short_description) VALUES ('Haruki Murakami', 'H. Murakami', 'Japan', 'ACTIVE', 'Japanese writer known for surreal and contemporary fiction.'), ('J.K. Rowling', 'Robert Galbraith', 'United Kingdom', 'ACTIVE', 'Author of the Harry Potter fantasy series.'), ('George Orwell', 'Eric Blair', 'United Kingdom', 'INACTIVE', 'English novelist and essayist famous for dystopian works.'), ('Jane Austen', 'A Lady', 'United Kingdom', 'INACTIVE', 'Classic English novelist known for romantic fiction.'), ('Mark Twain', 'Samuel Clemens', 'United States', 'INACTIVE', 'American writer and humorist, author of Tom Sawyer.'), ('Leo Tolstoy', 'L. Tolstoy', 'Russia', 'INACTIVE', 'Russian novelist best known for War and Peace.'), ('Agatha Christie', 'Mary Westmacott', 'United Kingdom', 'ACTIVE', 'Famous mystery and detective novelist.'), ('Dan Brown', 'D. Brown', 'United States', 'ACTIVE', 'Thriller novelist known for The Da Vinci Code.'), ('Paulo Coelho', 'P. Coelho', 'Brazil', 'ACTIVE', 'Brazilian lyricist and novelist, author of The Alchemist.'), ('Ernest Hemingway', 'Papa Hemingway', 'United States', 'INACTIVE', 'American novelist and Nobel Prize winner.'), ('Victor Hugo', 'V. Hugo', 'France', 'INACTIVE', 'French poet and novelist, author of Les Misérables.'), ('Fyodor Dostoevsky', 'F. Dostoevsky', 'Russia', 'INACTIVE', 'Russian novelist exploring psychology and philosophy.'), ('Nguyen Nhat Anh', 'NNA', 'Vietnam', 'ACTIVE', 'Popular Vietnamese author for teenagers and young adults.'), ('To Hoai', 'T. Hoai', 'Vietnam', 'INACTIVE', 'Vietnamese writer best known for Dế Mèn Phiêu Lưu Ký.'), ('Stephen King', 'Richard Bachman', 'United States', 'ACTIVE', 'American author famous for horror and suspense novels.'), ('Arthur Conan Doyle', 'A. Conan Doyle', 'United Kingdom', 'INACTIVE', 'Creator of the detective Sherlock Holmes.'), ('J.R.R. Tolkien', 'JRR Tolkien', 'United Kingdom', 'INACTIVE', 'Author of The Lord of the Rings fantasy series.'), ('Khaled Hosseini', 'K. Hosseini', 'Afghanistan', 'ACTIVE', 'Author of The Kite Runner and A Thousand Splendid Suns.'), ('Rick Riordan', 'R. Riordan', 'United States', 'ACTIVE', 'Author of Percy Jackson mythology novels.'), ('Trang Ha', 'Ha Trang', 'Vietnam', 'ACTIVE', 'Vietnamese writer and translator focusing on youth literature.');
